name: Phase Memory Weave
description: A viscous material that remembers its past while undergoing audio-driven phase transitions between fluid and crystalline states. Strong history creates beautiful hysteresis and pattern retention.

params.name: Memory Strength
params.description: How strongly the material remembers its history

params.name: Turbulence
params.description: Adds chaotic movement in fluid state

params.name: Mouse Disturbance
params.description: How strongly the mouse can force local phase changes
